nasb.text: Then he placed the lampstand in the tent of meeting, opposite the table, on the south side of the tabernacle.

esv.text: He put the lampstand in the tent of meeting, opposite the table on the south side of the tabernacle,

cnv.text: 摩西把燈臺設立在會幕裡，在帳幕的南面，與桌子相對。

ccb.text: 他把灯台放在会幕内的桌子对面，在圣幕的南侧，
